title: oetosis zosterifolia
intro: Oetosis zosterifolia, also known as Wild Yam, is a type of flowering plant native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Wild Yam include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce stress. Wild Yam is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is also used in herbal creams and salves to topically apply its medicinal properties.
